description: Design references and conventions for SaaS dashboard interfaces.
patterns: Collapsible sidebar navigation with icon + label
Top bar with search, notifications, and user avatar
Data tables with sorting, filtering, and pagination
Activity feeds and recent actions timeline
colorApproach: Neutral base with a single brand accent for primary actions. Use semantic colors for status indicators.
typographyApproach: Clean sans-serif (Inter, SF Pro) with clear size hierarchy. Monospace for data values.
